question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: South has a larger market share than Central.
options.B: Central has the largest market share among the regions.
options.C: North has the smallest market share.
options.D: Central has a higher market share than South.

explanation: From the labels, South has the highest share (39%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Central is largest when relying on visual comparison.
